examples: What the parishioner lost was enormous.
I'll discover the parish of that parishioner.
It was not so very long ago that I was a parishioner of the parish of die-of-hunger-if-you-have-a-fire, -die-of-cold-if-you-have-bread!
The body of Mr Suddards was discovered by a parishioner and two workmen on 14 February.
Mr. PAUL OSGOOD (Gay Parishioner): You accepted me when no one else would accept me.
